# Higress Plugins (llms.txt Index)

> LLM-friendly index for all built-in Higress Wasm Go plugins, centralized under `/llmstxt`.

This index is generated by `llmstxt/generate-plugin-llms-txt.sh`.

## Plugin llms Files
- [ai-agent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ongunao/higress/main/llmstxt/ai-agent.llms.txt): LLM-friendly plugin entry with doc/source links.
- [ai-cache](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ongunao/higress/main/llmstxt/ai-cache.llms.txt): LLM-friendly plugin entry with doc/source links.
- [ai-history](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ongunao/higress/main/llmstxt/ai-history.llms.txt): LLM-friendly plugin entry with doc/source links.
- [ai-image-reader](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ongunao/higress/main/llmstxt/ai-image-reader.llms.txt): LLM-friendly plugin entry with doc/source links.
- [ai-intent](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ongunao/higress/main/llmstxt/ai-intent.llms.txt): LLM-friendly plugin entry with doc/source links.
- [ai-json-resp](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ongunao/higress/main/llmstxt/ai-json-resp.llms.txt): LLM-friendly plugin entry with doc/source links.
- [ai-load-balancer](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ongunao/higress/main/llmstxt/ai-load-balancer.llms.txt): LLM-friendly plugin entry with doc/source links.
- [ai-prompt-decorator](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ongunao/higress/main/llmstxt/ai-prompt-decorator.llms.txt): LLM-friendly plugin entry with doc/source links.

## Optional
- [Higress Plugin Hub](https://higress.cn/plugin/): Official plugin catalog and quick lookup.
- [Repository README](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/ongunao/higress/main/README.md): Project-level overview and quick start.
